init_anchor.description: 000_INIT: Establish a governed session and verify identity. Use this tool first to authorize a session and mint the auth_context required for subsequent governed tools. Enforces F11 (Command Auth), F12 (Injection Defense), and F13 (Sovereign Override).

raw_input.description: Initialization query or identity declaration (e.g. 'I am arif').

revoke_anchor_state.description: 000_INIT: Immediately invalidate a governed session. Use this to explicitly end authority or terminate a session if a protocol breach is detected. Enforces F11 and F13.

session_id.description: The ID of the session to revoke.

register_tools.description: 000_INIT: Query the available tool surface and verify registration. Used by agents to understand which arifOS governance capabilities are currently exposed. Enforces F13.

arifOS_kernel.description: 444_ROUTER: Canonical metabolic transition router. The primary entry point for arifOS governance. Routes complex queries through the full ΔΩΨ metabolic pipe (Reasoning, Memory, Ethics, Judgment). Use this when you need a single sovereign response vetted through all 13 floors.

query.description: The question or task to process.

auth_context.description: Cryptographic authority context for high-risk actions.

risk_tier.description: Risk classification — higher tiers trigger stricter floor checks.

use_memory.description: Enable session memory retrieval and storage.

allow_execution.description: Allow material actions if permitted by ethical vetting.

debug.description: Include detailed debug telemetry in response.

dry_run.description: Run full pipeline without writing to VAULT999.

requested_persona.description: Persona to assume for the response (F9-compliant role).

caller_context.description: Advisory runtime context from calling agent. Server-governed — persona_id may be overridden.

forge.description: 000_999: One-shot metabolic pipeline trigger. Synthesizes a goal into a final, sealed action in a single call. Best for well-defined tasks where separate pipeline steps are unnecessary. Enforces all floors F1-F13.

spec.description: The design specification or goal to forge.

agi_reason.description: 333_MIND: Perform first-principles structured reasoning. Explores hypotheses through conservative, exploratory, and adversarial paths. Use this for intellectual synthesis. Enforces F2 (Truth) and F4 (Clarity).

query.description: The reasoning prompt or problem statement.

agi_reflect.description: 555_MEMORY: Perform metacognitive integration. Reflects on the current intelligence state and session context to ensure coherence before committing to a path. Enforces F4 and F7.

topic.description: The core topic or decision point to reflect upon.

reality_compass.description: 111_SENSE: Ground claims in external reality. Use this to verify facts or fetch URL content BEFORE performing reasoning. Enforces F2 (Truth) fidelity.

input.description: Fact string to verify or URL to fetch.

reality_atlas.description: 222_REALITY: Map evidence across multiple sources. Merges and queries EvidenceBundles to create a unified grounding context for complex investigations. Enforces F2 and F3.

operation.description: The atlas operation (merge, query, or build).

search_reality.description: 111_SENSE: Direct web search for grounding facts. Fetches raw data from the external world to satisfy F2 (Truth) requirements for ungrounded claims.

ingest_evidence.description: 111_SENSE: Fetch and normalize evidence artifact. Extracts structured signals from a URL or File for injection into the reasoning pipeline. Enforces F2.

asi_critique.description: 666_HEART: Advanced adversarial critique and thought audit. Detects blind spots, uncertainty, and hidden assumptions before action. Enforces F7 (Humility) and F9 (Anti-Hantu/Shadow).

draft_output.description: The candidate thought or output to audit.

asi_simulate.description: 666_HEART: Simulate consequences and predict world-model outcomes. Use this to assess the downstream impact of a proposal before execution. Enforces F5 (Peace²) and F6 (Empathy).

scenario.description: The scenario or action plan to simulate.

agentzero_engineer.description: 666_EXECUTE: Perform material system actions (code, shell, file ops). Requires valid session auth_context. Only for technical actions vetted by ASI levels. Enforces F11 (Authority).

task_description.description: Specific engineering task (e.g. 'write script to X').

agentzero_memory_query.description: 444_MEMORY: Recall semantic context from VAULT999. Retrieves past interactions and sealed truths to maintain session continuity and historical grounding. Enforces F2 and F7.

apex_judge.description: 888_JUDGE: Render a sovereign constitutional verdict (SEAL, VOID, HOLD, SABAR). Final authority for all candidate outputs. Enforces F3 (Tri-Witness) and F13 (Sovereign Override).

agentzero_validate.description: 888_JUDGE: Validator-specific output judgment. Audits the technical and logical correctness of an Engineer's output before final sealing. Enforces F2 and F9.

input_to_validate.description: The specific data or artifact to validate.

audit_rules.description: 333_MIND: Inspect the live status and thresholds of all 13 constitutional floors (F1-F13). Provides transparency into current governance constraints. Enforces F1-F13.

agentzero_armor_scan.description: 111_SENSE: Scan content for injection attacks and adversarial control. Used as a security guard (F12) before processing external or user input. Enforces F12.

agentzero_hold_check.description: 888_HOLD: Check status of a pending human escalation or sovereign hold. Used when a task requires manual intervention or ratification (F13). Enforces F13.

check_vital.description: 000_INIT: System health and thermodynamic telemetry monitor. Reports real-time ΔS (Entropy), Peace², and Gödel Humility metrics. Essential for metabolic budgeting. Enforces F4, F5, F7.

open_apex_dashboard.description: 888_JUDGE: Launch the browser-based APEX Dashboard. Provides high-fidelity visualization of constitutional traces, floor scores, and system vitals. Enforces F13.

vault_seal.description: 999_VAULT: Commit a verified verdict and evidence to the immutable VAULT999 ledger. Mints a permanent hash-chain entry. Enforces F1 (Amanah) and F13 (Sovereign).

verify_vault_ledger.description: 999_VAULT: Verify the integrity of the VAULT999 Merkle chain. Detects unauthorized tampering or data corruption in the historical audit trail. Enforces F1.

resources.description: F1-F13 constitutional floor thresholds — static reference.
